channel.title: GitHub Elm Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Elm in GitHub

item.title: azimuttapp/azimutt
item.description: Next-Gen ERD: Design, Explore, Document and Analyze your database

item.title: eikek/docspell
item.description: Assist in organizing your piles of documents, resulting from scanners, e-mails and other sources with miminal effort.
